data.title: Amazon rolls out AI “canvas” to help marketplace sellers analyze data
data.description: Using the new system, sellers can generate customized dashboards by asking questions such as “How are my products performing?” or “Can you analyze my sales performance?”

data.title: Xometry tightens grip on AI sourcing
data.description: Vaidy Raghavan, Xometry’s chief product and technology officer, said the changes shorten the time between data collection and operational impact by continuously retraining models on completed orders and delivery outcomes.

data.title: Henry Schein advances global ecommerce rollout
data.description: The platform consolidates Henry Schein’s digital storefronts into a unified architecture intended to standardize the customer experience across dental and medical merchandise, equipment and specialty categories.

data.title: Ecommerce earnings recap: What you missed from Warby Parker, Hims & Hers and more
data.description: Warby Parker's co-CEO assessed its ecommerce plans for 2026 as the company reported 11.2% net revenue growth in its latest Q4 earnings results.

data.title: The RealReal hits a milestone: $2 billion in GMV from its 2025 fiscal year
data.description: Both revenue and gross merchandise value (GMV) grew by double-digit percentages year over year in The RealReal's most recent fiscal Q4 and full year.
